query:
_index=sumologic_volume sizeInBytes _sourcecategory="sourcecategory_volume" 
| parse regex "\"(?<sourcecategory>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"sizeInBytes\"\:(?<bytes>\d+),\"count\"\:(?<count>\d+)\}" multi 
| timeslice 1h 
| bytes/1024/1024/1024 as gbytes 
| sum(gbytes) as gbytes by sourcecategory 
| where !(sourcecategory matches "*_volume") 
| compare timeshift -7d 2 avg 
| if(isNull(gbytes_14d_avg), 0, gbytes_14d_avg) as gbytes_14d_avg 
| if (isnull(gbytes),0,gbytes) as gbytes
| ((gbytes - gbytes_14d_avg) / gbytes) * 100 as pct_increase
| total gbytes  
| (gbytes / _total) * 100 as ingest_weight
| round(ingest_weight) as ingest_weight
| round(pct_increase) as pct_increase
| round(gbytes * 1024) as mb
| round(gbytes_14d_avg * 1024) as mb_baseline
// exclude removed 
| where (pct_increase >= 10 or pct_increase < -10) and ingest_weight > 1
 | fields -gbytes, gbytes_14d_avg,_total
| sort pct_increase

sources.panelTitle: Categories Volume Changes (weight > 1%, abs pct increase > 10%)
